title: 凌罗
content_json: [{"key":"0.27463270207325056","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1142/h_576/50364/103682/2024/9/24/118020.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_975/h_759/50364/103682/2024/9/24/552855.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.37b6bed37cbd7","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凌罗"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者凌罗，身份编码S06-020619，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"DOKI娱乐的当红歌星，以曼妙空灵的嗓音与超凡出尘的气质吸引|了一大批忠实的粉丝。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"日常总是习惯孤身一人，不擅长也不喜欢参与社交事宜。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"与人相处时寡言少语，从而很容易被不熟悉的人们曲解其性格十分高傲与冷漠，加之其鲜少为自己辩解，故误会往往会愈演愈甚。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"实际上是个内心柔软，心性善良的人，若是有人给予她一分好意，她往往会以十二分的行动去报答。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"据悉其唯一信任的人是蜃海会馆的前任会长娜菲忒，在她失踪后，其便开始频繁以采风之名独自旅行。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"显而易见，这场旅行另有目的，可迄今为止尚未有人挖掘出她内心深藏的秘密。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"typ :[{"text":"效果抵抗"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/207704.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害双向提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害结果提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害结果降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【我希望她能因我的歌声而感到幸福。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"以下内容取材自一段偶像大赛的影像回放："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"画面中的少女不过十一二岁出头，她身着白色长裙，伫立于舞台中放声歌唱。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"曼妙的嗓音如同天籁，打动了所有在场的听众。评审团无一例外，全员为她亮出满分。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「凌罗小姐，今夜是您出道首秀，请问您有什么想对镜头前的粉丝说吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"年幼的凌罗尚未习惯闪光灯的簇拥，她只是地对着镜头微笑，而后小声说道一一"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我希望我的母亲娜菲忒女士能够喜欢这场演出······还有，我祝愿她生日快乐。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【我……只是想要踏上旅途。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"以下内容节选自「DOKI娱乐月刊」里的一段动态专访："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「凌罗小姐，据可靠消息，不久前结束了您本年度的最后一场巡演，而在此之后，您要暂别台前，转至幕后了吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「是的。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「可以透露一下具体的原因吗？要知道，一位当红歌星在鼎盛时期突然宣告无限期息影……于情于理都是一大憾事。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「对不起——我……我只是打算去旅行。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「很有趣的理由，凌罗小姐，对不起，请原谅一个媒体人的好奇心，『旅行』是个引人遐思的词汇……您打算跟什么重要的人一起吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「没有………我一个人……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那么，凌罗小姐，请问您……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「对不起，我无法回答这个问题。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【我们都是困顿于过去的影子。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"以下内容来自匿名娱乐记者的影像记录："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"画面背景是一片空寂的海面，一位少女正站在海岸边眺望远方，那正是许久不曾出现在公众视野的凌罗。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在她身后还站着一位身姿曼妙的年轻女性，有把握认为那就是DOKI娱乐的另一位当红巨星夏妲本人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「没想到能在这里相遇。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我每隔几周都会来这儿住上一段时间。其实你也时不时就会回来看看，对吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「是啊。毕竟这是她以前常常带我们来玩的度假别墅嘛，梨梨那孩子第一次来的时候还被这里的环境吓得直哭。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「原来已经过去了那么久……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「过去了那么久，我们却仍然对她的下落一无所知……真是可悲。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「别这样自责，娜菲忒女士一定在某个地方等着我们。或许，或许只要等我完整唱出那首约定之歌，就能……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"只见夏妲警惕地朝镜头方向看了一眼，凌罗的话语随之被打断，画面开始剧烈晃动，一切都终止了。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.df4434b9b4805","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基础信息","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"治疗"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 511|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性3生命 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"不论pve还是pvp都有着极高治疗量的表现，还是白送的角色，打奥洛拉必练"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.dea253f76605d","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"pve:12疾驰+8治愈+6进化荫庇;pvp:12浴血+8戍卫+6进化荫庇"}]}]}},{"key":"0.e97a84882f45b","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"超新星"}]}]}},{"key":"0.db3c6ff8b615f8","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":""}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_300/h_242/50364/842288/2025/7/18/807558.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"WIysW6zq3ZpzX5es","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
